samples.xml_description:
<module id="serial2parallel">
    <description>Implement a series-parallel conversion circuit.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="din_serial">Serial input data.</input>
        <input id="din_valid">Validity signal for input data.</input>
        <output id="dout_parallel" width_description="[7:0]">Parallel output data.</output>
        <output id="dout_valid">Validity signal for the output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="cnt">Counter to count the number of input data.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="cnt" width_description="[3:0]">Counter to count the number of input data.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <comment>Implement a series-parallel conversion circuit.</comment>
        <case>
            <when><comment>Reset the counter when the reset signal is active.</comment> cnt == 4'b0000</when>
            <then>
                <assign><comment>Reset the counter when the reset signal is active.</comment> cnt = 4'b0000;</assign>
                <assign><comment>Reset the output valid signal when the reset signal is active.</comment> dout_valid = 1'b0;</assign>
            </then>
            <when><comment>When the input data is valid, start counting.</comment> cnt == 4'b1000</when>
            <then>
                <assign><comment>Reset the counter when the reset signal is active.</comment> cnt = 4'b0000;</assign>
                <assign><comment>Set the output valid signal when the input data is valid.</comment> dout_valid = 1'b1;</assign>
                <assign><comment>Output the parallel data.</comment> dout_parallel = {dout_parallel[6:0], din_serial};</assign>
            </then>
            <otherwise>
                <assign><comment>Increment the counter when the input data is valid.</comment> cnt = cnt + 1;</assign>
                <assign><comment>Reset the output valid signal when the reset signal is active.</comment> dout_valid = 1'b0;</assign>
            </otherwise>
        </case>
    </implementation>
</module>
